storyHook: 停车加油，付款，继续上路

narrative.when: 周五下午，开车去外地前
narrative.who: 甲（司机）· 乙（加油站工作人员）
narrative.how: 把车停在油泵旁，下车交流
narrative.method: 说明加多少油、付款、检查车窗、继续上路
narrative.event: 甲油表快到红线了，要赶在天黑前到达目的地

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Make it full, please.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Which sort?

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Regular, please.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Right, I will do that.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: I am short of time.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Going far?

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Yes, two hundred before dark.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: That is a long way.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: I will take a bottle of water too.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Here you go. Safe journey.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Right, let me get the window for you.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: That is kind, thank you.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: No trouble. Oil and water are good.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Good. What do I give you for the oil?

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Forty five even.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Right, here is the card box.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Put it through for forty five?

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Yes, that is right.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Done. Take your card.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Thanks. I will put the water in the car.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Do the wheels need a look?

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: No, they are all right. I had a look before.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Right then, you are ready to go.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: I will get in now. Good day to you.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Good day. Go safe.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Well, i will get in now. Good day to you.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Well, good day. Go safe.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Well, thanks. I will put the water in the car.
turns.zh: 多谢。我把水放到车上去。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Right, let us have a look at the wheels.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Well, no, they are all right. I had a look before.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Well, right then, you are ready to go.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Well, yes, that is right.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Right. Here is your card back.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Right. I will put the water in the car.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Well, do the wheels need a look?

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: No, they are good. I had a look before I came out.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Good. That is everything. Have a safe journey.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Thanks. How much do I give you for the water?

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: No payment needed. It is free.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: That is very kind. Well, I will be off.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Right. Let me get back in.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Have you got everything?

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Yes. phone, keys, water.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Good. You look ready to go.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: I am ready. The sun is going down.
turns.zh: 准备好了。太阳快下山了。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Then you had better start the engine.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Will do. Thanks for the help.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: No trouble. Have a good journey.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: I will. okay on the way back.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: okay. Go with care.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Right, I will get the pump started.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: How much would you like?

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Put in the normal sort, please. Full up.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: That is all right. It will be quick.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: The number is going up quick.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Yes, this pump is a good one.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: That is full. 238.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: I will put it on my card.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Put it here. Sign there.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Done. Can I get a bottle of water?

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Yes, take one. That will be 3.50 more.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Right, here is the note. Keep the change.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: That is kind of you. Have a good journey.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Thanks. I will be off now. Long way to go.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Your back window is a bit dirty.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Is it? I did not see that. Can you give it a rub?
turns.zh: 是吗？我没注意。能帮我擦一下吗？

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Yes, I have a cloth here.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: That is very good of you. Thank you.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: All done. Clean as new.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Great. I will go now. Thanks!
turns.zh: 太好了。那我出发了。谢啦！

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Right then, I will get the payment done.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: This way. The machine is inside.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: How much is it?

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Fifty eight even.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Here you are. Keep the change.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Oh, that is very kind. Are you certain?

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Right, no trouble. I am short on time.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Right. Would you like a bottle of water?

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Yes, please. That would be great.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Well, here you go. Safe journey.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Thank you. I will be off then.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Well, your back window is a bit dirty.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Is it? I did not see it.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Let me give it a quick clean.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: That is very good of you.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: No trouble at all. There you go.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Right, I am ready now.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Have a good journey. Get there before dark.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: I will do my best. sure.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: sure. Go safe.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Right, engine on.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: The store is full now.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Yes, I see it on the face.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: You have a long way to go?

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: About two hundred more of them.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: That is a good stretch.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: I will go slow.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Keep the windows up if it gets cold.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Good idea. I will do that.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Off I go then. Good day!

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Right, I will be off now.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: be safe on the road.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: I will. The sun is going down.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: You have three hours of light.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: That is enough for me.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Keep your eyes open for animals.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Good point. I will be sharp.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Safe journey, friend.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Thank you. sure for now.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: See you again.

storyBlurb: 周五下午，甲在高速路口停车加油，油表已近红线，他必须赶在天黑前到达目的地。
storyScript:
【开场·驶入加油站】周五下午的阳光斜斜地照在高速路口的加油站上，甲把车缓缓驶入，停在空着的油泵旁。他熄了火，瞥了一眼仪表盘上的油表指针——它正颤巍巍地靠在红线上方。甲深吸一口气，推开车门，热风裹着汽油味扑面而来。他得抓紧时间，天黑前还有两百多公里的路要赶。

【进行·加油付款】加油站工作人员乙从便利店走出来，手里拿着抹布，朝甲点了点头。甲指了指油箱盖说，加满，普通汽油。乙熟练地拧开盖子，插入油枪，油泵发出低沉的嗡嗡声。甲站在一旁，看着油表数字跳动，心里盘算着路程。油枪咔嗒一声跳停，乙拔出油枪，拧紧盖子，用抹布擦了擦车窗上的灰尘。甲掏出钱包，跟着乙走进便利店，扫码付款。他顺便要了一瓶水，乙笑着递给他，说路上小心。

【收束·继续行程】甲回到车里，发动引擎，油表指针稳稳地指向满格。他调整了一下后视镜，系好安全带，将车缓缓驶出加油站。夕阳把路面染成金色，甲看了眼导航，还有三个小时。他轻踩油门，车子汇入高速车流，向着目的地疾驰而去。后视镜里，加油站渐渐变小，消失在地平线上。甲打开收音机，音乐响起，他放松了肩膀，嘴角露出一丝微笑。
